title: A resolution to recognize and celebrate the 30th anniversary of the Denver International Airport.
plain_summary: This bill is about celebrating an important anniversary for a major airport. Denver International Airport in Colorado opened thirty years ago on February 28, 1995. The Senate wants to officially recognize and celebrate this milestone on February 28, 2025. The resolution is a way for Congress to honor this anniversary and acknowledge the importance of this airport to Denver and the country.
last_action_text: Referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. (consideration: CR S1433)

sections.title: Resolution
sections.text: The Senate officially recognizes and celebrates February twenty-eighth, two thousand twenty-five, as the thirtieth anniversary of the Denver International Airport.
